name: petabo
description: 家族・友人で共有する TODO ＋チェックリストアプリ（Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1）

scripts.e2e:server: wrangler d1 migrations apply petabo --local && wrangler d1 execute petabo --local --command "DELETE FROM todo_reminders; DELETE FROM comments; DELETE FROM todo_tags; DELETE FROM checklist_items; DELETE FROM todos; DELETE FROM tags; DELETE FROM login_attempts; DELETE FROM sessions; DELETE FROM invite_tokens; DELETE FROM memberships; DELETE FROM users; DELETE FROM households;" && npm run build && wrangler dev --ip 127.0.0.1 --port 8799
